channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cars parking on bus stand, 2nd May
item.description:
I am bus driver and facing everyday evenings cars parking on the bus stand in which endanger our passengers whom have to be leaving the bus unsafe and prams lifted from high bus down to the road then crossing to the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Hall Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive ants in Ardeley Court, 2nd May
item.description:
Lots of ants in Ardeley Court surrounding what look like a liquid spillage. Causing health and safety hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brownswood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Main Enterance door Cross court (13-24) Denmarkhill Estate, 2nd May
item.description:
We found the main entrance door unscure please fixed it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-36, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 2nd May
item.description:
Construction site hoarding seems to be encouraging fly tipping. Cot, bin, crib etc

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mycenae Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallets and southwark cleaning bags, 2nd May
item.description:
Next to the cycle hanger on the corner of Sutherland Square and Sutherland Walk SE17

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Square, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Low-hanging tree branches, 2nd May
item.description:
It's a lovely park, but in several places there are tree branches low enough to make the paths difficult to walk or run.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canberra Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road with big hole in the middle, 2nd May
item.description:
Big deep hole in the middle of road
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned cargo bike, 2nd May
item.description:
Abandoned cargo bike covered in a black tarp on the pavement outside a restaurant - tyres flat and taking up lots of space on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old South Lambeth Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking in double yellow line, 2nd May
item.description:
In bellamy road 59-69, En8 9ju. Every night, cars park in double yellow line until late morning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48-58, Bellamy Road, Cheshunt, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 2nd May
item.description:
Outside no 9. Remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11-13, Bromley Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Graffiti, 2nd May
item.description:
Outside no 5. Remove graffitti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Rubbish dumped up the footpath, 2nd May
item.description:
Rubbish at footpath number 49 Chessington leading to Hythe Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chessington Avenue, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 23 Little Russell Street, 2nd May
item.description:
The street light, number 3, outside 23 Little Russell Street isn't working, the area is a hotspot for ASB and darkness attracts unsafe behaviour Please fix urgently
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Little Russell Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped builder's rubble, please remove., 2nd May
item.description:
Flytipped builder's rubble scattered alongside the house wall. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light is day burninf, 2nd May
item.description:
Rushey green near Hsbc Bank in grass area Street light is day burning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brownhill Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole in skate mini vert ramp, 2nd May
item.description:
There is a hole in the skate ramp in the skate park that is potentially very dangerous as it will throw someone off who could be injured. It’s on the flat part of the main mini vert ramp

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ethelbert Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light day burning, 2nd May
item.description:
Outside 146 Rushey Green Street light column is day burning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 136, Rushey Green, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer, 2nd May
item.description:
Fridge freezer

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Avenue, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large pothole in the middle of the road, 2nd May
item.description:
I hit this pothole the other night luckily didn't cause damage your my car but it was very deep and made and awful noise it must be at least 6 - 8 inches deep as my cars front fairing caught it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bank eroded from road leaving a deep drop, 2nd May
item.description:
The earth has eroded between the road and the bank creating a very deep long pothole/ gulley. If something slightly wider than a var was parked the chances are a car would "fall off the road on the drivers side causing damage to their car.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Harland Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
